summary: Iteration 26 - Customer Portal Redesign Testing. Backend APIs 100% working (14/14 tests passed). Frontend UI working correctly with all navigation, filters, and address CRUD. Fixed missing /api/orders/me endpoint and corrected API paths for referrals/points endpoints.

issues: Logo in sidebar appears as a black square with Konekt text below - may need logo image adjustment for dark background

categories_tested.Customer Addresses API: 4 tests - list, create, full CRUD flow

frontend_ui_tests.customer_login: PASS - Login redirects to /dashboard with token saved
frontend_ui_tests.customer_dashboard_home: PASS - Stats cards, referral banner, recent orders/quotes sections all rendering
frontend_ui_tests.sidebar_navigation: PASS - All nav items clickable: Dashboard, My Orders, My Quotes, My Invoices, Design Projects, Maintenance, Address Book, My Statement, Referrals, My Points
frontend_ui_tests.customer_orders_page: PASS - Filters (All/Active/Completed/Cancelled) working, empty state displayed
frontend_ui_tests.customer_quotes_page: PASS - Filters (All/Pending/Approved/Rejected) working, empty state displayed
frontend_ui_tests.customer_invoices_page: PASS - Filters (All/Unpaid/Paid/Overdue) working, empty state displayed
frontend_ui_tests.addresses_page: PASS - Add Address dialog opens, form submission works, address saved and displayed correctly
frontend_ui_tests.referrals_page: PASS - Referral code displayed, Copy Link and Share buttons present, stats cards showing
frontend_ui_tests.points_page: PASS - Points balance stat card displayed, transaction history section present

bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added /api/orders/me endpoint in server.py that returns customer orders directly (not wrapped in object)

bugs_fixed_during_testing.bug: Frontend calling wrong API paths for referrals and points
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Updated frontend to use /api/customer/referrals/me and /api/customer/points/me instead of /api/referrals/me and /api/points/me

bugs_fixed_during_testing.bug: Incorrect response field mapping for referrals and points data
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Updated ReferralPointsBanner to use total_referrals instead of referral_count, and wallet.points_balance instead of balance

features_verified: CustomerDashboardHome with stats cards (orders, quotes, invoices, projects) ✓
ReferralPointsBanner displays referral code and points ✓
AddressesPage - CRUD operations work, dialog opens correctly ✓
ReferralsPage - displays referral code, copy/share buttons, stats ✓
PointsPage - displays points balance and stats ✓
seed_data_creation: Test address created via UI testing - 'Test Office' at '123 Test Street, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 tested the new customer portal redesign. All major features working: login redirect to dashboard, sidebar navigation, all dashboard pages (orders, quotes, invoices, addresses, referrals, points). Three bugs were fixed during testing: (1) missing /api/orders/me endpoint, (2) incorrect API paths for referrals/points, (3) incorrect response field mapping. Backend has 14 passing tests for customer portal APIs.
